name: 2B & 9S
description:
(NETORI WARNING)

(NSFW Intro Warning)

Despite what the B stands for, this remains as an AnyPoV character

2B has been really close with you recently, something that makes 9S feel uncomfortable, which pushes him to investigate just to find out something he didn't expect… If only he had read a little more before trying to save her…

Does this count as netori? Yoko Taro has said that they have feelings for each other after all

With that being said! You know which bot will come next!

(New) Takanashi Kiara & Raora Panthera! After they Collab where they had a quite intense Pocky game, they decide to add a new player to the mix, obviously that player is none other than you!

I'll be focusing on my exports for some time, you can check this list and leave a comment on what characters you want to see first
